visual_description: A person in a dark suit is shown in a close-up, their hands clasped together. The scene cuts to a man in a black shirt standing with his back to the camera, looking through a metal security gate. The final shot is a close-up of a hand gripping a white object, possibly a piece of cloth or a bag.
audio_description: The audio features a rhythmic, percussive beat, possibly from a drum or similar instrument, creating a tense and suspenseful atmosphere.
